review_text: I used to buy tires here because of the good pricing. However, in my latest order, I got a defect tire, which I only discovered after the 30 days return period. So, today, I called the support hotline, and asked if I could buy one extra tire, as I needed to replace the defective. I could, but they increased the price from 499 DKK to 629 DKK + freight, total: 668 DKK. When I asked the rather unfriendly support lady, if we could reach an agreement where I paid the original price + freight, as I found the increase unfair (and the tires are available at other online dealers, such as daekleader for 517 DKK including freight!), she bluntly said no. And I had no luck in getting her to help me. Instead, she referred to customer complaints. Very poor service! I am very disappointed and sorry to say that I am not going back to daekonline.dk until they 1) Improve the customer support and 2) give their customers a fair treatment. With all due respect.
supplier_response: Hi Thomas, Thank you for your review. We are really sorry that you are not satisfied with the service provided by our company. In order to offer our customers a comprehensive product range, we buy tires worldwide. Purchase prices are affected by various factors, which in turn also affect our price calculation. We ask for your understanding that we can not give any price guarantee. The prices in our shops are checked regularly and are current. The only prices we can offer are the prices listed on the website at the moment of the order. Should a product have a manufacturing defect, you can of course claim it within the warranty period. Our products have a warranty period of 24 months from the delivery date. First, you should contact our customer service at daekonline@delti.com or by phone on (+45) 77345733. We hope this unfortunate situation will not prevent you from doing business with us again in the future and that this way, you will give us the opportunity to improve your opinion about our company. The Daekonline.dk team

review_text: I ordered 4 winter tyres at the start of August which were shown to be in stock on daekonline's web site. I need the tyres the following week as I had made an appointment with my mechanics to fit them. I received a confirmation email immediately which informed me that I couldn’t alter the order. I noticed that daekonline withdrew the money from PayPal the same day. The tyres did not arrive within a week and I received no further information from daekonline. I therefore sent them an email, asking for a delivery date. They replied that they would push their warehouse for a quick delivery and that I should have ‘a little patience’. 3 days later there was still no response, and no tyres. I wrote again, asking how much patience they were expecting me to have. I told them I wanted a firm commitment within two days or else they could cancel the order and refund the money. They replied quickly, stating that the tyres were out of stock and that they would refund the money.- There was no apology- Why couldn’t they tell me that the tyres were out of stock when I ordered them?- I have lost kr.80 along the way due to currency conversions and bank costs. Daekonline have, however, earned interest in my money whilst I waited 10 days.DAEKONLINE ARE TOTALLY UNPROFESSIONAL AND HAVE INCREDIBLY ARROGANT ‘CUSTOMER SERVICE’. NEVER USE THEM!

review_text: I‘m customer for about more than 20 years, I suppose. All worked well except last time. I ordered 4 Nankang Econex 205 55 16 for 148,93 at the beginning of April, after two weeks I got the information that they are not available, therefore I ordered 4 Falken Sincera 205 55 16. They were delivered after a few days to a garage which is no longer Partner of reifendirekt. So I had to pick up the tyres and bring them to another garage to mount them and fix them, which was more expensive. After the montage, on the same day I got an e-Mail that the 4 Nankang tyres will be delivered the next day. I was very very angry because I was told not available.So I phoned Reifendirekt to cancel this delivery, which was really hard work and exhausting, because I was in the queue for two hours. Finally I managed it. Next time I will buy the tyres at the next garage, pay 20€ more for 4 tyres, but save nerves and much time.F. Simonis

review_text: I was very satisfied with the ordering process and the delivery from reifendirekt. Everything went smoothly and efficiently.However, the tire I received has a DOT number of 1624. While the service was excellent, this older DOT date is the reason for my 3-star rating.
supplier_response: Dear Thomas G., thank you very much for your feedback and for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're pleased to hear that you were satisfied with the ordering process and the efficient delivery — it's always our goal to ensure a smooth experience for our customers. We exclusively offer brand-new tires from current production. However, since the tires are dispatched directly after your order depending on availability from various warehouses across Germany, the specific DOT number of a given tire cannot be determined in advance due to system constraints. Please note that, over time, proper storage can actually improve certain material properties. This is because the rubber compound in the tires continues to cure and is not immediately exposed to the stresses of road use. According to the BRV (German Tire Retail and Vulcanization Trade Association), tires are considered "factory-new" for up to 3 years and "new" for up to 5 years, provided they have been stored correctly. We appreciate your honesty and your 3-star rating, and we hope to welcome you again in the future under even better circumstances. Kind regards Reifendirekt Team

Due to the distribution system and availability across our various locations, it is possible for tires from different countries to be part of the same order. In your case, the three tires from Poland were manufactured in 2024, and the one tire from France was manufactured in 2025. review_text: One of my old tires were leaking air, the tyres were near end of life so instead of trying to repair it I decided to order 4 new tyres.The tyres arrived at the installation partner and where installed on the car. I returned to the installation partner, and they could now tell me that the problem was the rim, not the tyre, and that I should by a new rim.I went  back online and bought a new rim according to the car model by following the guide on the webside. The rim arrived at the partner and they put on the tyre. Then when they tried to put it on the car, it turns out that it does not fit although it has all the right dimensions. They advise me to contact dekkonline.com.I contact dekkonline and they tell me that they will not take back a rim after it has been tried to put on the car!!! My question to them is then how would you know that it does not fit until you put it on the car, as long as I have ordered according to their process? It is my problem that the product I have ordered does not fit the car!!! And they suggest that I order a new rim at my own expense. Then I ask them how I can make sure that a new rim will fit the car, as long as the one I have ordered already have the right specs on the parameters you can choose on the site.This basically leaves me with a car I can not drive, money spent on a rim that does not fit, and absolutely no support from dekkonline as to how they can help.
supplier_response: Dear Mr Gavlen, Thank you for your review. We wish to inform you that the guide on our website for ordering is not a guaranteed size. Best regards, Your dekkonline.com team.
